194	const State = struct {
195	    // The effective buffer to process Vietnamese input. we will skip processing if the buffer
196	    // longer than 16.
197	    buffer_effective: [16]Span,
198	    // The maximum buffer length that the engine still keeps the effective buffer, after the maximum
